industries.name: Aerospace & Aviation
industries.description: Commercial, cargo, and regional aircraft parts sourcing for OEMs and MRO facilities.
industries.longDescription: We supply certified aerospace components for the full spectrum of commercial aviation — from narrow-body single-aisle jets to wide-body long-haul aircraft. Our inventory covers structural, propulsion, avionics, and cabin systems across all major airframe programs.

industries.name: Aircraft Components & Accessories
industries.description: High-grade structural components, actuation systems, and avionics accessories for fixed-wing and rotary-wing aircraft.
industries.longDescription: We supply FAA-certified and MIL-SPEC compliant aircraft components ranging from hydraulic actuators and landing gear parts to avionics cooling fans and structural fasteners. Our inventory supports commercial fleets (Boeing 737, 787, Airbus A320) and military variants, ensuring full traceability, conformity to OEM drawings, and compliance with AS9100 and NADCAP standards.

industries.name: Aircraft Launching, Landing & Ground Handling
industries.description: Essential ground support equipment (GSE), catapult components, arresting gear, and towbarless tractors.
industries.longDescription: Our product line covers the full spectrum of airfield ground support, including shipboard catapult launching systems, carrier-based arresting gear wires, and heavy-capacity tow tractors. We provide OEM and aftermarket parts for the M-32, A/S32A, and A/M32 series ground equipment, supporting both land-based airbases and carrier air wings with rapid-response logistics and 24/7 AOG support.

industries.name: Ship & Marine Equipment
industries.description: Naval-grade propulsion, deck machinery, and communication systems for surface vessels and submarines.
industries.longDescription: We are a trusted supplier of NAVSEA-certified marine equipment.

industries.name: Engines, Turbines & Components
industries.description: High-performance jet turbine blades, compressor disks, and complete propulsion systems.
industries.longDescription: Specializing in OEM and PMA parts for gas turbine engines, including fan blades, compressor stators, combustion chambers, and turbine rotor assemblies. We support CFM56, F110, and T700 engine families with full FAA 8130-3 traceability and chemical composition certifications. Our engineering team provides reverse-engineering solutions for obsolete engine components.

industries.name: Engine Accessories
industries.description: Fuel pumps, starters, ignition exciters, and control systems that keep aircraft engines running safely.
industries.longDescription: Our inventory includes a wide range of engine-mounted and line-replaceable accessories, including fuel metering units, engine starter generators, ignition exciters, and vibration monitoring sensors. We provide rapid sourcing for both civil and military engine accessory needs, with strict adherence to OEM overhaul manuals and EASA Part 145 repair station requirements.

industries.name: Switches & Electrical Connectors
industries.description: Mil-qualified toggle switches, circuit breakers, and multi-pin circular connectors for harsh environments.
industries.longDescription: We are a leading distributor of high-reliability electrical interconnect solutions, offering a vast selection of MS (Military Standard), NAS (National Aerospace Standard), and AN (Air Force-Navy) connectors and switches. Our products are qualified for extreme temperature, vibration, and moisture conditions, supporting avionics, flight control, and power distribution systems. We maintain a $50M+ inventory of ITT Cannon, Amphenol, and TE Connectivity parts.

industries.name: Microcircuits, Electrical Hardware & More
industries.description: Radiation-hardened microcircuits, semiconductors, and precision hardware for aerospace & defense electronics.
industries.longDescription: We provide cutting-edge microelectronics and hardware, including ASIC processors, FPGA modules, surface-mount capacitors, and precision hardware like standoffs and terminals. Our sourcing network ensures access to EOL (End-of-Life) and active components, fully compliant with DLA (Defense Logistics Agency) standards and solderability requirements for mission-critical avionics, radar, and satellite systems.
